creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Sat, 10 Oct 1998 rtaylor@csolve.net wrote:

> >Synopsis:       Eggdrop Port

Once upon a time I was on the eggdrop devel list and yadda yadda, in any
case. This program is one that is really difficult to set up system wide
as a lot of options are compile time.

It would take some work with to make this program useful system wide, and
from the PR filed, I don't think the author has the knwledge required to
do it.

> >Class:          doc-bug

Wrong.

> >Description:
> 
>         I've Created a new port for eggdrop bots, how in the heck do I send it 
> to you... (The submitting the port section needs alot of tweaking.)  It was 
> find till then...

It's actually, quite well written. I'm going with operator error on this
one.
